title: Button click does not open modal
description: When clicking on the 'Submit' button on the dashboard, nothing happens and the page remains static.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to dashboard
2. Click 'Submit' button
3. Observe no modal opens

title: Database connection timeout during load spike
description: The backend log shows multiple connection timeout errors during high traffic periods, causing 500 Internal Server Errors.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Simulate 100 concurrent requests
2. Check logs for timeout errors

title: App crashes on login with special characters in username
description: If a user tries to login with a username containing special characters like @, $, or %, the application immediately crashes with a null pointer exception.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Enter special characters in username field
2. Click login

title: SQL injection vulnerability in user search input
description: The search query in user controller is directly concatenated with input, allowing SQL injection.

title: Add export to Excel button in dashboard
description: We need a feature to export the bug tracking table to Excel format for offline analysis.

title: API endpoint returns 404 for user profile retrieval
description: GET /api/users/profile returns 404 Not Found even for authenticated users.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Login as user
2. Send GET request to /api/users/profile

title: Config key parsing fails for double quotes
description: The config reader fails to parse keys that contain double quotes, raising a SyntaxError.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Set config key with double quote
2. Start server

title: User table balance column goes negative
description: A race condition in transaction endpoint allows wallet balance to drop below zero.
